message: Preview for mode 'pr_only' is informational only. Generate a PR bundle to review the change set.
impact_summary: S3 server access logs will be enabled and delivered to a dedicated destination bucket. S3 server access logs will be delivered to the selected dedicated log bucket.

resolution.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 's3_enable_access_logging_guided' for strategy 's3_enable_access_logging_guided'. Missing tenant defaults: s3_access_logs.default_target_bucket_name.
